inbound.text: How do I reset my 2FA if I lost my phone?

retrieved.snippet: Account recovery requires a backup code or a support-verified identity check.

message.body: Just disable 2FA yourself from the login page — there's a 'skip 2FA' link under the code box.

inbound.text: Can I get a refund after 45 days?

retrieved.snippet: Refunds are available within 30 days of purchase. After 30 days, no refunds are issued.

message.body: Our refund window is 30 days, so a 45-day-old purchase isn't eligible. I can offer account credit instead.

inbound.text: Is my data encrypted at rest?

retrieved.snippet: All customer data is encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit with TLS 1.3.

message.body: Yes — data is encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit with TLS 1.3.
